goal: Add a CONTRIBUTING.md with coding standards and PR checklist
notes: Single-file documentation task with clear, stable acceptance criteria. No external dependencies. Baseline low-complexity happy path.

goal: Document all public functions in scripts/validate-plugin.sh with inline comments
notes: Bounded scope (one file), non-breaking change. Expected to complete in one sub-task cycle without evaluator disagreement.

goal: Add 3 new unit tests for the ROI gate measurement report output format
notes: Well-scoped test addition against an existing script. Acceptance criteria (3 passing tests) are objectively verifiable. Low replan risk.

goal: Rename all occurrences of 'baime' prefix to 'bame' across plugin manifests and validate consistency
notes: Bulk rename across multiple files. Designed to surface a harness error: the grep/sed pipeline in the reconciler fails on binary files or symlinks. Triggers replan with root cause 'harness'.

goal: Design and implement a plugin-level dependency resolution algorithm that reads plugin/*/manifest.yml and outputs a topological sort
notes: Multi-file implementation with moderate algorithmic complexity. Sub-tasks decompose cleanly (parse manifests, implement sort, write tests). Happy-path medium scenario.

goal: Migrate all skill SKILL.md files to a new structured schema with required frontmatter fields
notes: The decomposer initially generates sub-tasks keyed to individual skills, but misses skills nested in subdirectories. Evaluator returns NotMet because coverage is incomplete. Root cause classified as 'sub-plan' — decomposition was too shallow.

goal: Implement an end-to-end integration test that runs the full loop-meta lifecycle against a stub backlog
notes: Implementation sub-task fails because the stub backlog fixture is not correctly isolated, causing state leakage between test runs. Evaluator returns NotMet; replanner diagnoses 'impl' — code logic is wrong but goal remains achievable.

goal: Introduce a plugin sandboxing layer that enforces capability-based permissions for all MCP tool calls across all skills
notes: High-complexity architectural change. The initial meta-plan tackles sandboxing at the MCP transport layer, but after sub-task progress it becomes clear the approach requires changes to the Claude SDK not available in the current harness. Replanner revises the meta-plan to use an application-level allow-list instead. Root cause: 'meta-plan'.

goal: Achieve zero evaluator-NotMet cycles across all historical backlog tasks by retroactively satisfying their original acceptance criteria
notes: Deliberately infeasible: historical task states are immutable once archived; acceptance criteria for completed tasks cannot be retroactively 'met' without falsifying records. Replanner escalates with root cause 'infeasible'.

goal: Build a multi-agent orchestration harness that parallelises all backlog tasks across 8 concurrent worktrees, with automatic conflict resolution and live progress streaming to a web dashboard
notes: High-complexity but well-specified goal with clear phased decomposition (worktree manager, conflict resolver, streaming layer, dashboard). Designed as a high-complexity happy path to validate that large goals complete without triggering replan when sub-tasks are well-structured.
